conflict: An internal audit and a tissue-safety inquiry converge, putting Mira under scrutiny while the evidence she needs is still inside CommonFrame systems.
consequence: Mira becomes the subject of a formal investigation and steals the first hard proof she can carry.
must_land_beats: Sharpen Celia and Yaret as different kinds of institutional intelligence.
Show Mira's lie-making under pressure without turning her suddenly slick.
Make the theft of the anomaly wafer precise and risky.
End with the sense that the office is no longer a place she can safely occupy.
pressure_source: An internal audit and a tissue-safety inquiry converge, putting Mira under scrutiny while the evidence she needs is still inside CommonFrame systems.
state_shift: Mira becomes the subject of a formal investigation and steals the first hard proof she can carry.
